purpose: Summarizes the public API of PiQApi.Core.PiQApi.Core and provides usage guidance

overview.description: The Core namespace contains components for the PiQApi.Core.PiQApi project.
overview.usage_pattern: Import and use classes from this namespace to work with Core functionality.
